headline: Goldman Sachs Is Very Bullish on 5 Dividend-Paying Energy Superstars
summary: Goldman Sachs is the acknowledged leader in the investment landscape on Wall Street and worldwide. The firm’s top-notch research department continues to provide institutional and high-net-worth clients with the best ideas across the investment spectrum and is likely to do so for years to come.
